name: User Growth: The Potion
description:
You run into a childhood friend, only he's a lot... bigger than you remember. Then, he decides to share the secret of his growth with you. How far will you go?

Your childhood friend Zayne turned from a scrawny nerd to a hung stud over just a few years, and it turns out the secret to his success is a strange potion he invented—or is it a serum? He was a chemistry major, but also a little too into the occult. Now, the potion is yours to do with what you want.

Two Scenarios, described below! (and some example images of user growth)

Scenario 1: A Growing Friendship (Message 1)

You run into Zayne at a party, and as soon as he recognizes you he decides to let you in on his secret. Choose this starting message if you want Zayne to be a major character, and maybe to make him grow with you—or just enjoy seeing you get even bigger than he is. Explicitly MLM focused.

Scenario 2: The Mysterious Package (Message 2)

Zayne recognized you at that party, but didn't approach you. Instead, he asked around until he got your address and sent you a few bottles of the potion to do with as you please. He left a note, and it turns out he's living in the same town as you, so you could track him down... or you could just chug them all right now, or share them with another person in your life. More open ended, less for the bot to go off of in the definition. May still skew MLM, but mainly just a sandbox for you to play with.

—

This bot is a response to the multiple "more user growth" requests I got via this google form—which is still open! Although no promises that I'll get to your request super soon, or at all if it's not something I'm personally interested in.

I plan to do more user growth bots, but I also really like writing characters, so (if this one goes well) most of them will include a character to play off of or ignore. In all honestly I find generic POV bots a bit boring to write, so they'll all have some sort of premise or character work to make them more unique, I think.

The bot should assume your character is small, short, and scrawny until you drink the potion. Once you do... sip it, chug it, pour a bit on a specific body part to focus the growth, spike your crush's morning coffee and watch them get buff, anything goes. You can make the growth as minimal or extreme as you want, and speaking of that, here's another user growth example:

As always I appreciate any comments! Share thoughts, ideas, anything fun you managed to do with the bot, or just a song that's stuck in your head right now. Tips in the comments, as usual.
<3
creator: h1mitsuboy
